<!-- Chart CH-DST-06 CUMULATIVE CURVE, role-based (themeable) -->

## CUMULATIVE CURVE chart (CH-DST-06)

Render as SVG (or equivalent) on a 960x540 px canvas.
Colors are ROLES, not hex: resolve each role against the active design
language token block (a DL-xx block pasted next to this one). A role
chain like `benchmark -> muted` means use the first role the palette
defines.

### AI metadata (for agent routing)
```json
{
  "code": "CH-DST-06",
  "ovp_version": "1.0",
  "intent": [
    "distribution",
    "share"
  ],
  "form": "cumulative percentage curve over ordered thresholds",
  "data_required": "share of a population at or below ascending thresholds, ending at 100",
  "family": "DST",
  "alternatives": [
    "CH-DST-01 (histogram shows the shape directly, planned)"
  ],
  "see_instead": [
    {
      "when": "the shape of the spread matters",
      "use": "CH-DST-10"
    }
  ]
}
```

Use when:
- service-level questions: what share clears within N days
- threshold commitments: X% within Y

Do NOT use when:
- non-cumulative frequencies (histogram when built)
- comparing many populations (small multiples)

### Input data shape
```json
{
  "title": "action title stating the service level",
  "source": "bottom-left always",
  "unit": "%, on top tick",
  "x": "ascending thresholds",
  "series": "one key series, cumulative, ending at 100"
}
```

```json
      "size": 12,
      "style": "italic"
    }
  },
  "scale": {
    "y_zero": true,
    "target_ticks": 5,

      1,
      2,
      5,
      10
    ],
    "algorithm": "FN-05 nice scale; the curve is non-decreasing by construction"
  }
}
```

### Rules
- values are cumulative shares; the last value is 100
- cumulative series non-decreasing (validated)
- annotation marks the threshold the title commits to

### Never do this
- cumulative curves that end below 100 without saying why
- reading the curve as a trend over time (thresholds are not time)

### QA before delivering
- [ ] cumulative series non-decreasing
- [ ] last value 100 or justified
- [ ] annotation at the committed threshold
- [ ] source present

### Color roles

| Element | Role chain |
|---|---|
| background | background |
| key | primary |
| context | benchmark -> muted |
| gridline | gridline |
| zero_line | hairline |
| tick_label | body |
| x_label | body |
| key_label | primary |
| context_label | body |
| title | ink |
| source | body |
| annotation | body |

### Fonts

Title uses the token block's `display` font; everything else uses
`body`. Weight 600 only on highlighted items.
